page_title: Shiro SAGISU Music from "SHIN EVANGELION" EVANGELION: 3.0+1.0 Shiro SAGISU composition
text:
Shiro SAGISU Music from "SHIN EVANGELION" EVANGELION: 3.0+1.0 Shiro SAGISU composition is the soundtrack album to the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time, released on 25 October 2024 in a 3 discs vinyl collection. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu and published by Milan Records with the catalog number . https://milanrecords.shop/products/shiro-sagisu-shin-evangelion?srsltid=AfmBOoqEAo1Qi5WKLRY-zEool5i3RZCkjfRLEe_U1MVRxAwU_SOyxkY4
